recommendations.title: Kidulthood
recommendations.overview: A day in the life of a group of troubled 15-year-olds growing up in west London.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.

recommendations.title: Dìdi (弟弟)
recommendations.overview: In 2008, during the last month of summer before high school begins, an impressionable 13-year-old Taiwanese American boy learns what his family can't teach him: how to skate, how to flirt, and how to love your mom.

recommendations.title: What Will Become of Us
recommendations.overview: A coming-of-age tale about three 18-year-olds just out of high school who go to a Greek island following one of the boys' older girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: Three high school seniors throw a party to make a name for themselves. As the night progresses, things spiral out of control as word of the party spreads.

recommendations.title: Moonrise Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Set on an island off the coast of New England in the summer of 1965, Moonrise Kingdom tells the story of two twelve-year-olds who fall in love, make a secret pact, and run away together into the wilderness. As various authorities try to hunt them dow

recommendations.title: Waiting...
recommendations.overview: Young employees at Shenaniganz restaurant collectively stave off boredom and adulthood with their antics.

recommendations.title: 10 Years
recommendations.overview: A group of friends reunite ten years after their high-school graduation.

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: Staten Island Summer
recommendations.overview: Pals Danny and Frank spend the summer after high school working as lifeguards while figuring out their future.
